content: r8brain CDSPResampler is asynchronous: output sample count varies per process() call; realtime uses pull model feeding input until host block filled; resampler auto-consumes initial latency; getLatency()/getLatencyFrac() report filter delay; constructor requires MaxInLen for internal allocation; process() returns pointer to resampler-owned output buffer; leftover output must be consumed before next process(); getMaxOutLen(MaxInLen) sizes output scratch; not thread-safe.
